summary:
Head positioning does not significantly affect anterior chamber depth in pseudoexfoliation syndrome based on current literature. The lack of specific studies linking head position to AC depth in PEX means no clinically supported relationship exists between them. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

Okay, let me refine and finalize just one concise summary that meets all requirements:

Head positioning has no established effect on anterior chamber depth in pseudoexfoliation syndrome according to existing clinical evidence. Available data do not show any variation in anterior chamber depth attributable to head position in patients with PEX.
